---
title: "Conspiratorial narratives on Facebook and their historical contextual associations: A case study from Cyprus"
author: "Kouros, Th., Papa, V., Ioannou, M., and Kapnisis, V."
date: 2022-01-01
description: "Journal of Communication Inquiry. doi: 10.1177/01968599221117235"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
